species: Subjects with albumin-to-creatinine ratio (ACR) ≥ 30 mg/g and preserved renal function are considered to be at no cardiorenal risk in clinical practice...
disease_state: Early diagnosis and treatment of chronic kidney disease (CKD) is a worldwide challenge.
sample_source: Glycoproteins were analyzed in urine from hypertensive patients within the HN ACR range compared to control group...
age: Patients between 40 and 75 years were included.
